name: p267c_h6_m3plus_decomposition_conditional
theory_basis: H6 ew85 M2-only vs M3+ 分層分解（conditional：僅當 per-draw evidence 可重現）
expected_direction: H6 per-draw evidence 不可重現則輸出 H6_EVIDENCE_NOT_REPRODUCIBLE，不引用 wiki 摘要數字
notes: P267C pre-registration (HR-P267B-M3PLUS-REVAL-001); read-only revalidation; no DB write

H1.name: per_ball_exit_rank_heterogeneity
H1.statement: Per-ball mean exit-rank (1-based position within the drawNumberAppear draw-order sequence, conditional on the ball being drawn) is heterogeneous across balls, beyond what a within-draw fully-exchangeable permutation null predicts.

windows.excluded_months_reason: Already inspected by P268B (look-ahead avoidance per P268D1 registry-freeze).

null_model.description: For each draw, the k drawn-ball identities (a fixed-size slice of drawNumberAppear, per-game GAME_CONFIG) are an exchangeable set; all k! orderings are equally likely under the null. Monte Carlo null generated by independently re-permuting each draw's order labels.

statistic.name: sum_of_squared_standardized_per_ball_mean_exit_rank
statistic.description: For each ball in the pool with n_b appearances in the estimation window, standardized z_b = (mean_exit_rank_b - mu_k) / sqrt(sigma_k^2 / n_b), where mu_k=(k+1)/2 and sigma_k^2=(k^2-1)/12 are the mean/variance of a discrete Uniform{1..k}. Test statistic T = sum(z_b^2) over balls with n_b >= 1.

correction.primary_daily_539_correction: single pre-registered test, no cross-game Bonferroni required for H1 itself (per P268D1 registry-freeze)
correction.secondary_games_correction: EXPLORATORY label only; no Bonferroni/BH-FDR gating applied; cannot alone promote to strategy

pass_fail.H1_PASS_condition: Estimation-window one-sided permutation p < 0.01 for DAILY_539 AND the holdout window remains unopened/unused for any H2/H3 computation in this task.
pass_fail.secondary_games_note: Secondary-game results cannot alone promote H1 to PASS or trigger H2/H3.

name: p269c_calendar_regime_c05_daily539_saturday_m3plus
primary_h1: Saturday vs Mon-Fri M3+ rate difference
endpoint: temporal OOS last 1765 DAILY_539 eligible draws (eligible = valid date + numbers, non-Sunday, first-draw excluded); locked cutoff draw 109000253..115000141; evaluable subset = OOS ∩ replay coverage of declared strategy (N=1494, Sat=249, Mon-Fri=1245) — declared before any outcome look
strategy_selection_rule: P269B rule: highest in-OOS replay coverage (not performance). All 15 DAILY_539 strategies tie at 1494; tie broken by P269B design artifact's pre-named recommended primary candidate acb_markov_midfreq_3bet.
m3plus_definition: P265A SSOT: draw-level any-bet success, MAX(hit_count>=3) per distinct target_draw, special_hit excluded, denominator = distinct target_draw
null_model: weekday/Saturday labels exchangeable under fixed observed M3+ outcome vector within the locked OOS endpoint
statistic: absolute difference in M3+ rate; Saturday minus Mon-Fri also reported

pass_fail_gate.H1_PRIMARY_PASS_POSITIVE: p < 0.01 and Saturday M3+ rate > Mon-Fri M3+ rate
pass_fail_gate.H1_PRIMARY_SIGNIFICANT_NEGATIVE: p < 0.01 and Saturday M3+ rate < Mon-Fri M3+ rate

fisher_exact_backup: only if Saturday M3+ event count < 5; clearly labeled backup; does not override primary gate
